title: ubfreight.com
description: UB Freight is a leading provider of worldwide freight services, specializing in air and sea freight, customs clearance, and warehousing solutions. They cater to a diverse clientele, including large companies with complex shipping needs and individuals looking to send personal items overseas. With IATA authorization and a network covering over 140 countries, UB Freight ensures competitive pricing and dependable service for all shipments. Their in-house customs clearance team and dedicated staff facilitate efficient handling of various cargo types, including dangerous goods and oversized items. Stolen: --
